permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: Vaporly needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: So Vaporly can hear your voice.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: So Vaporly can type your words into any app.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

permissions.stuckHint: Granted it but still spinning? macOS sometimes needs the app removed from the list and re-added. You can continue, Vaporly will keep reminding you until it's set.

sttDownload.title: Setting up your speech model
sttDownload.description: Vaporly transcribes entirely on this computer. One quick download and your voice never leaves the machine.
sttDownload.failed: The download didn't finish. Check your connection and try again.

cleanupDownload.title: Setting up your cleanup model
cleanupDownload.description: Vaporly polishes what you say with a small language model that also runs entirely on this computer. One more download and everything stays local.
cleanupDownload.failed: The download didn't finish. Check your connection and try again, or skip for now and download it later from the Dictation page.

tryIt.title: Try your voice
tryIt.subtitleSpeak: and say anything. Release the keys and watch your words appear.
tryIt.placeholder: Your words will appear right here…
tryIt.downloading: Your speech model is still downloading, the hotkey will work the moment it finishes.
tryIt.successBody: That's all there is to it, dictate into any app, in any text field.

mode.title: Theme
mode.description: Follow your system's light or dark look, or force one. Applies to the settings window and the dictation overlay.

accent.title: Accent color
accent.description: The color Vaporly speaks in: buttons, toggles, selections, the waveform. Every preset keeps text readable in both themes.

mode.title: Whisper mode
mode.description: Whispers transcribe; louder sound is ignored. Boost and cutoff follow the strength. Applies from your next dictation.

strength.title: Strength
strength.description: Light ignores only loud sounds and boosts gently. Medium ignores a normal talking voice. High expects a true whisper and boosts hardest.

calibration.title: Mic calibration
calibration.description: Optional wizard: it measures your room, your normal voice, and your whisper, then tunes whisper mode to this microphone. The room is part of the measurement, so run it again whenever you dictate somewhere new (a different room, mic, or background noise).
calibration.intro: Three steps: stay silent, speak normally, then whisper. Each step records until you press the button (it unlocks after 5 seconds).

phase.normal: Speak in your normal voice: count upward from one and keep going.
phase.whisper: Now whisper: keep counting, as quietly as you can.

done.good: Great separation. Your whisper and your normal voice are easy to tell apart on this mic.
done.workable: Workable separation. Whisper mode will work, with occasional misses.
done.poor: Poor separation. This mic barely distinguishes your whisper from your voice, so whisper mode may be unreliable.
done.tip: Tip: recalibrate whenever you move to a new environment. The room is part of the measurement.

calibration.unlocksIn: Recording... the button unlocks in {{s}} s.
calibration.pressWhenDone: Recording... press the button when you are done.

whisper.calibrationHint: Three steps: stay silent, talk normally, then whisper. Each button unlocks after 5 seconds. Recalibrate whenever you move somewhere new.

dictation.hotkeyHint: Hold to talk, release to paste. Double-tap to lock hands-free, tap again to finish.

conflict.title: Shortcut conflict
conflict.description: {{keys}} is assigned to more than one action ({{actions}}). Only one of them will trigger, give each action its own combination.

globeNotice.title: Using the Fn (globe) key
globeNotice.body: In macOS System Settings, Keyboard, set "Press globe key to" to "Do Nothing", otherwise dictation taps also open the emoji picker.

style.title: Style
style.tooltip:
Nothing: you fly blind.
Bar: a pill shows listening, then working.
Live transcript: the pill fills with your words.
Raw then polished: live words, then the polish replaces them.
Cleaned sentences: each sentence arrives already cleaned.
Inline: underlined live words that polish themselves.

position.title: Position
position.description: Where the overlay sits on screen while you dictate.

filler.label: Filler fix up
filler.description: Clears out the ums, uhs, and stutters. Light takes only the core hesitations, Medium the full list, High also trims filler phrases and false starts.

mindChange.label: Mind-change check
mindChange.description: Applies your spoken self-corrections, so "at eight, no wait, nine" becomes "at nine". Higher levels catch more correction cues.

context.label: Context awareness
context.description: Adapts formatting to the app you are dictating into: casual in chat, literal in code editors, full sentences in email and notes. Toggle the app kinds Vaporly should adapt to.

status.title: Engine status
status.description: Vaporly's built-in cleanup engine (llama.cpp) runs entirely on this machine. It starts automatically whenever a cleanup stage uses the model.

engine.skippedWarming: Cleanup engine is warming up, pasted the raw text.
engine.skippedDown: Cleanup engine isn't running, pasted the raw text.

shortcut.title: Vaporly Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Set the keys that start and stop dictation.

transcribe.name: Dictate
transcribe.description: Hold and speak, release to paste. Double-tap to lock hands-free.

cancel.name: Cancel
cancel.description: Stops the current dictation and discards it.

hands_free.name: Hands-free
hands_free.description: Press once to start hands-free dictation, press again to stop. Optional; the double-tap on your dictate key keeps working.

whisper_toggle.name: Whisper Mode toggle
whisper_toggle.description: Flips Whisper Mode on or off, with a sound as confirmation.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

autostart.label: Launch on startup
autostart.description: Automatically start Vaporly when you log in to your computer.

keepClipboard.label: Keep result on clipboard
keepClipboard.description: After pasting, the dictated text stays on your clipboard. Off restores whatever was there before.

trailingSpace.label: Append trailing space
trailingSpace.description: Add a space after pasted text, handy when dictating mid-sentence.

updateChecks.label: Check for updates
updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of Vaporly.

updateStatus.title: Update status
updateStatus.description: Vaporly checks quietly in the background. Click to check right now.

version.title: Version
version.description: The Vaporly build you are running.

logDirectory.title: Log directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored, useful when reporting a problem.

danger.resetAllDescription: Every option returns to its shipped default: hotkeys, overlay, cleanup dials, everything. Your history, recordings, and downloaded models are NOT touched.
danger.resetAllDone: All settings are back to defaults.
danger.resetOnboardingDescription: Shows the welcome walkthrough again the next time Vaporly starts.
danger.resetOnboardingDone: Setup will run again on the next launch.

sound.previewFailed: Could not play the sound preview.

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.description: Pick the microphone Vaporly listens through.

audioFeedback.label: Audio feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play a sound when dictation starts and stops.

theme.label: Sound theme
theme.description: Pick the sounds you hear when dictation starts and stops.

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

words.title: Custom words
words.description: Add words that get misheard or misspelled. Vaporly nudges similar-sounding words to match your list.

level.title: Correction level
level.description: How aggressively similar sounds snap to your words. Off disables the stage, High corrects even loose matches.

phrases.title: Custom phrases
phrases.description: When you say a trigger phrase, Vaporly writes its saved text instead: shortcuts like "btw" becoming "by the way", or whole templates like "write my email format" inserting your saved email. Works in every dictation, with or without cleanup.

level.title: Correction level
level.description: How loosely a spoken trigger may be misheard and still expand. Off disables phrases, High accepts looser matches. Single-word triggers always match exactly.

phrases.empty: No custom phrases yet. Add a shortcut or a template.
phrases.writePlaceholder: What it writes (e.g. by the way)
phrases.hint: Triggers match even when slightly misheard. Keep triggers under 8 words. Empty rows are not saved.

autoLearn.title: Learn new words
autoLearn.note: Learned words appear in Custom words above, where you can edit or remove them anytime.

off.label: Off
off.description: Vaporly never adds words on its own.

history_edits.label: From History edits
history_edits.description: When you correct a word in History, Vaporly learns the corrected spelling.

repeated_words.label: From repeated unknown words
repeated_words.description: Unfamiliar words you dictate several times get added automatically.

both.label: History edits + repeated words
both.description: Learns from your History corrections and from words you dictate repeatedly.

watch_post_paste.label: Watch post-paste edits (experimental)
watch_post_paste.description: Briefly watches the text field after pasting and learns from corrections you make there. macOS only, best effort.

history.title: History
history.empty: Nothing written yet. Hold your hotkey, say a sentence, and it shows up here, saved only on this Mac.
history.deleteError: Couldn't delete that entry. Please try again.
history.retranscribeError: Couldn't re-transcribe that. Please try again.
history.transcriptionFailed: That one didn't come through. Use the retry icon to try again.
history.noResults: No matches. Try a different word.

edit.failed: Couldn't save your edit. Please try again.

limit.title: History limit
limit.description: Maximum number of dictations to keep.

retention.title: Auto-delete recordings
retention.description: Automatically delete old audio recordings to save space. Transcripts stay in History.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: Vaporly needs accessibility permissions to type your words into any app.

micPermissionDenied.generic: Vaporly can't hear you yet. Grant microphone access in your system settings, and your voice stays on this computer.
micPermissionDenied.windows: Enable microphone access in Settings → Privacy & security → Microphone (including desktop app access).
micPermissionDenied.macos: Grant microphone access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.
micPermissionDenied.linux: Grant microphone access in your system's sound or privacy settings.

errors.noInputDevice: Vaporly can't find a microphone. Plug one in or connect a headset, then try again.
errors.pasteFailed: Those words did not make it. They are on your clipboard, so paste them anywhere.

toasts.sttUpgraded: Upgraded to {{model}}, faster and more accurate for English. Your old model is still installed.
